info.title: Sensors
info.description: The Sensors REST API allows you to manage your Sensors Library, create new sensor assets or update existing ones, and download sensor assets as files.

delete.summary: Delete a sensor from the library.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the sensor in the library.

get.summary: Read the sensor with the given id.
get.description: The existing identifiers in the library can be seen in SensorLibrary -> GET: /sensors.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the sensor in the library.

put.summary: Update the sensor given by its id with the information in the body
put.description:
Some properties of the sensor are mutually exclusive, so they should be set to null and only set the desired one.
To get the correct json structure, use the GET: /sensoreditor/{id} service.
Example: At the highest level of the json, there can be either a camera or a lidar or a radar, so if a camera is updated, lidar and radar should be set to null.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

requestBody.description: Json containing all properties of the sensor.

delete.summary: Update the sensor definition by deleting an external file.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

externalFileInfo.description:
Additional information needed to identify the file to delete.
Example:
=> for radar beam forming: { "lidarInfo": null, "antennaInfo": null, "modeInfo": {"id" : "0"}, "cameraInfo": null }
=> for lidar: { "lidarInfo": { "propertyEnum": "FiringSequenceFilePath", }, "antennaInfo": null, "cameraInfo": null }
propertyEnum for lidar: FiringSequenceFilePath, LidarLensDistortion
=> for camera: { "lidarInfo": null, "antennaInfo": null, "cameraInfo": {CameraExternalsEnum: 'CfaTransmissionR'} }
propertyEnum for camera: CfaTransmissionR, CfaTransmissionG, CfaTransmissionB, QuantumEfficiency, LensTransmission, CameraLensDistortion, FragmentShader

get.summary: List all sensors available in the library.
get.description:
Valid sensors will be displayed under validSensors, with their id, type and name.
If there are any corrupted sensors, they are deleted from the library and their names will appear in corruptedSensorNames, or if the name cannot be retrieved, the flag anyDeleted will be set to true.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of initial sensors to skip.

schema.description: Number of initial sensors to skip.

parameters.name: sortByType
parameters.description: Should sensors be sorted by type.

schema.description: Should sensors be sorted by type.

parameters.name: sortByName
parameters.description: Should sensors be sorted by name.

schema.description: Should sensors be sorted by name.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Filter sensors by names containing pattern substring.

schema.description: Filter sensors by names containing pattern substring.

post.summary: Create a new sensor with default values for each of its properties.

parameters.name: copyOf
parameters.description: Create a copy of the sensor with the given id. In this case the POST body should contain the desired name.

schema.description: Create a copy of the sensor with the given id. In this case the POST body should contain the desired name.

requestBody.description:
Information needed for sensor creation: type of sensor to create and its name.
Accepted types: Camera, FishEyeCamera, RotatingLidar, FlashingLidar, Radar. Example: {"type":"FlashingLidar", "name": "my_lidar"}

get.summary: Download the sensor to a file with the specified name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

parameters.name: packedSensorName
parameters.description: Desired name for the packed sensor file.

schema.description: Desired name for the packed sensor file.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

parameters.name: property
parameters.description:
Field describing which property is targeted. Accepted properties are :
for Camera: CfaTransmissionR, CfaTransmissionG, CfaTransmissionB, QuantumEfficiency, LensTransmission, LensDistortion, FragmentShader
for Lidar: ScanningSequenceIdentity, IntensityFilePath, LensDistortion
for Radar beam forming: ModeBeamForming:modeId where modeId is an integer value

schema.description:
Field describing which property is targeted. Accepted properties are :
for Camera: CfaTransmissionR, CfaTransmissionG, CfaTransmissionB, QuantumEfficiency, LensTransmission, LensDistortion, FragmentShader
for Lidar: ScanningSequenceIdentity, IntensityFilePath, LensDistortion
for Radar beam forming: ModeBeamForming:modeId where modeId is an integer value

post.summary: Upload multiple packed sensors and add them to the library
post.description: Conflicts might appear if a sensor with the same name already exists in the library.

sensorUpdatesJson.description:
Json structure with a list of actions for each conflicting sensor that is referenced in the layout. Contains: new name, should replace sensor or not.
Replace : [{"name":"Camera","newName":"","overwrite":true}]
Rename : [{"name":"Camera","newName":"NewCamera","overwrite":false}]

put.summary: Update the sensor definition by uploading an external file.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

externalFileInfo.description:
Additional information needed for the file upload.
Example:
=> for radar pattern table: { "lidarInfo": null, "antennaInfo": { "id": "0","antennaType": "Tx"}, "cameraInfo": null }
=> for radar mode: { "lidarInfo": null, "antennaInfo": null, "modeInfo": {"id" : "0", "RadarExternalsEnum": 'TransmitterWeightingSequence'}, "cameraInfo": null }
propertyEnum for radar: TransmitterWeightingSequence, ChirpSequence, PulseSequence
=> for lidar: { "lidarInfo": { "propertyEnum": "FiringSequenceFilePath", }, "antennaInfo": null, "cameraInfo": null }
propertyEnum for lidar: FiringSequenceFilePath, IntensityFilePath, LidarLensDistortion
=> for camera: { "lidarInfo": null, "antennaInfo": null, "cameraInfo": {CameraExternalsEnum: 'CfaTransmissionR'} }
propertyEnum for camera: CfaTransmissionR, CfaTransmissionG, CfaTransmissionB, QuantumEfficiency, LensTransmission, CameraLensDistortion, FragmentShader

put.summary: Protect a section of a sensor with a password.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

password.description: Password used to protect a sensor for a specific section: it must be between 8 and 12 characters in length, and must contain at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.

section.description:
Field describing which section is targeted to be protected :
for Radar: RadarAntenna,RadarMode

put.summary: Unprotect a section for a given sensor using its password.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

schema.description: Unique identifier of sensor in the library.

password.description: Password used to remove protection for a specific section.

focalLength.description: Focal length of the lens system (mm).

wavelengthOfFocalLength.description: Wavelength of focal length of the lens system (mm).

focalShift.description: Maximum amplitude for the focal dispersion. (micro meter)

focalLength.description: Focal length of the lens system (mm).

offsetAngle.description: Angle between the diaphragm and the optical axis of the camera (rad).

edgeNumber.description: F-number or Effective Aperture (F = Focal length / diameter of the aperture area).

lensTransmission.description: Total transmission of a light ray file(.spectrum).

Pre.Sensors.v6.Data.Sensor.Camera.Imager.description: Average electronic noise within the imager.

gain.description: Gain to amplify the whole signal (decibel - dB).

Pre.Sensors.v6.Data.Sensor.Camera.Sensor.description: Define the level of output for the camera simulation.

Pre.Sensors.v6.Data.Sensor.Camera.Custom.description: Define the level of output for the camera simulation.

bitResolution.description: Number of bits used for the waveform.

Pre.Sensors.v6.Data.Sensor.Lidar.Common..description: Define the level of output for the LiDAR simulation.

peakPower.description: Maximum power emitted by laser pulse (W).
